_doc: SOUNDNESS-FIRST r1 (KM-R6 design, CONCRETIZED). Additive top-2 margin + log-prob rejection-span aux losses on top of plain classical KD. Resumes from classical_continue_r2 best.pt (step 300, eval BPB 1.409 — b_star). Kill rules and max_steps are now absolute step numbers, accounting for start_step=300.

_notes.loss: L_total = L_CE + 0.05 * L_fkl + 0.01 * L_margin + 0.01 * L_floor (in log-prob space, gauge-invariant)
_notes.resume_behavior: start_step pulled from best.pt = 300. Loss schedule runs against absolute step, SF ramp runs against (step - start_step) i.e. ramps over absolute steps 300-350.
_notes.kill_rules_interpretation: Absolute steps. 500 = SF step 200 (200 steps post-resume). 800 = SF step 500. 1100 = SF step 800 (horizon). Thresholds: b_star=1.409 + {0.015, 0.005, -0.010} per KM-R6.
_notes.success_criterion: Eval BPB <= 1.389 by absolute step 1100 (>= 0.020 below b_star); decisive target from KM-R6 is <= 1.350 if r2 ended above 1.350, which it did.
_notes.failure_mode_next_step: If SF improves by <0.02 over b_star, launch RBOR per KM-R7 (research/codex_km_r7_response.md).
